caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in front of a professional microphone. The setting appears to be a retail space or studio, featuring a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and racks of clothing in the background. The walls are adorned with several framed photographs. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "NO CAP" and red text on the right that says "DROSSY FLY TOT". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and subtly shifting his expression, moving from a neutral look to a slight smile. The camera remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up as he engages in a conversation, with the background and equipment remaining unchanged throughout the clip.
